basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Research Fellow, Project Technical Support Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi)
basic_details.post_name: Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic), Project Technical Support
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi (AIIMS Delhi) Recruitment 2026: All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi has released the official notification for 4 Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates in Delhi. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking stable and well-paid research jobs.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max 35 years for Senior Research Fellow and Project Technical Support - III (MSW), Max 28 years for Project Technical Support - I (Lab Technician).
age_limit.details: Maximum Age: 35 years | Maximum Age: 35 years | Maximum Age: 28 years

qualification.details: BAMS degree from a recognized University/Institute Valid registration of related State Board/ Council or Central Council/ NCISM | Three years graduate degree in relevant subject/field OR PG in relevant subject/field Three years post qualification experience | 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI Or equivalent) Three years Graduate degree Two year experience in relevant subject/field (after Diploma) OR One year experience in relevant subject (after Graduate degree)

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-08-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: AIIMS Delhi Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the AIIMS Delhi Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download AIIMS Delhi Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: BAMS degree from a recognized University/Institute Valid registration of related State Board/ Council or Central Council/ NCISM Three years graduate degree in relevant subject/field OR PG in relevant subject/field Three years post qualification experience 10th + Diploma (MLT/DMLT/ITI Or equivalent) Three years Graduate degree Two year experience in relevant subject/field (after Diploma) OR One year experience in relevant subject (after Graduate degree)

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Maximum Age: 35 years Maximum Age: 35 years Maximum Age: 28 years

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Various Posts Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 10-08-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AIIMS Delhi to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 is 10 August 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 4 vacancies announced in the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026. These positions include Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic), Project Technical Support - III (MSW), and Project Technical Support - I (Lab Technician).

faq.question: Q3. What are the posts available in AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The posts available in AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026 are Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic), Project Technical Support - III (MSW), and Project Technical Support - I (Lab Technician). Each post has specific eligibility criteria.

faq.question: Q4. What is the application mode for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for AIIMS Delhi Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) and other related posts is online. Candidates need to submit their applications through the provided online link or by scanning the QR code.

faq.question: Q5. What is the maximum age limit for Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) post is 35 years. For Project Technical Support - I (Lab Technician), the maximum age is 28 years.

faq.question: Q6. What is the salary for Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) at AIIMS Delhi?
faq.answer: The salary for the Senior Research Fellow (Ayurvedic) post at AIIMS Delhi is Rs. 42000/- per month, along with an additional 30% HRA. Other posts have different salary structures.

faq.question: Q7. What is the minimum qualification required for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment varies by post. It ranges from 10th pass with a diploma for Lab Technician to BAMS degree for Senior Research Fellow and Graduate/PG for Project Technical Support - III.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the job location be for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these temporary research project posts will be in New Delhi, Delhi. All India Institute of Medical Sciences Delhi is the recruiting organization.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any application fee for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification for the AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026. Candidates should always refer to the official document for the most accurate information.

faq.question: Q10. How can I apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: To apply for AIIMS Delhi Recruitment 2026, candidates must submit their resumes along with self-attested documents online using the provided Google Forms link or by scanning the QR code mentioned in the notification.
